concept: Golf: Where losing balls is part of the fun
title: Funny Golf Shirt for Players Who Call 'Fore!' More Than They Score
description:
When it comes to golf, they say it's the most frustrating way to enjoy nature. But hey, losing balls just means you're contributing to the ecosystem, right? This cheeky, relatable design is ideal for golfers who know they're not winning PGA tournaments anytime soon—but they still love the game, the laughs, and the excuse to escape reality for a few hours. 

Perfect for:
- Golfers who count 'fore!' as cardio
- Weekend warriors with more divots than drive
- Anyone who knows the real victory is hitting the beer cart.

DETAILS:
- Designed for golf lovers who embrace the chaos and comedy of the game.
- Available in a full range of colors that pair well with your favorite course-ready attire.
- Made-to-order with bold, humorous styling that stands out on or off the green.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
